arts.ttl: How Southampton could be relegated this weekend
arts.sum: Southampton's relegation from the Premier League could be confirmed on Sunday, and if so, it would set a record. The teams who finish the season in the bottom three places of the Premier League table - 18th, 19th and 20th - drop down to the Championship, the second tier of English football.

arts.ttl: ‘Completely made up’ – Tottenham exit not on the cards, European giants aren’t interested
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are not interested in Tottenham captain Heung Min-son and rumours linking him with a move are completely made up. That’s according to journalist Christian Falk on the Bayern Insider podcast, with him completely dismissing the recent claims. arts.ttl: “Open to the opportunity” – Tottenham youngster has big decision to make
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur youngster Leon Myrtaj has a big decision to make when it comes which country has wants to represent. The 17-year-old has already represented Albanian U16 and U17s and is eligible to play for England and Hungary. arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou vows to confront fans filming him for ‘five minutes of fame’
arts.sum: The Tottenham boss had a confrontation with a spectator after his side’s 2-0 loss at Fulham on March 16.
